heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly sunny east if the Greens, increasing clouds west. Highs in the upper 60s to lower 70s near and south of Route 2, low to mid 60s to the north, except in 50s and falling in the St. Lawrence Valley. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, except northerly or becoming so near the international border.

heading: Tonight
text: Increasing clouds. Chance of rain showers, mainly north; with freezing rain likely in the St. Lawrence Valley, and patchy elsewhere from Route 2 northward. Lows in the low to mid 30s north, and mid 30s to around 40 south. Winds becoming light and variable, except becoming northeast 5 to 10 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: from the northeast in areas near and north of Route 2, elsewhere from the southeast.

heading: Patchy freezing rain early, from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward, otherwise scattered showers, with a rising chance north mid to late afternoon. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s, some 60s from Bennington south and west. Winds 10 to 15 mph, and gusting to 25 mph
text: from the northeast in areas near and north of Route 2, elsewhere from the southeast.
